title: ManualDecisionQueueEntry
description: A local draft queue entry created from a weekly review decision candidate. Never approved for live action until explicit human review.

queue_item_id.description: Unique stable ID for this queue entry (qdec_<timestamp>_<hash>).

created_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when the entry was created.

source_review_run_id.description: Run ID of the weekly review that generated the candidate.

source_decision_id.description: decision_id from the source decisions_recommended.jsonl entry.

source_file.description: Repo-relative path to the source decisions_recommended.jsonl.

title.description: Human-readable title for the decision item.

recommendation.description: Short recommendation text from the candidate.

next_local_step.description: Next local manual step. Must not imply posting, selling, outreach, payment, scraping, upload, launch, or login.

blocked_reason.description: Reason the item is blocked, if applicable.

linked_experiment_id.description: Linked experiment ID from the tracker, if known.

approval_required.description: Always true. Human approval required before any live step.

status.description: Queue item status. N+3.31 intake always starts as 'draft'.

public_or_money_facing.description: Always false at intake. No public or money-facing action permitted.

public_action_allowed.description: Always false. No public action permitted without explicit approval.

live_account_action_allowed.description: Always false. No live account action permitted.

external_action_allowed.description: Always false. No external action permitted.

model_output_executed.description: Always false. Model output is never auto-executed.

artifact_only.description: Always true. This is a local artifact only.

no_live_action_taken.description: Always true. No live action taken at queue time.

safety_flags.description: Safety gate flags confirming no live actions were taken.

metrics_snapshot.description: Snapshot of known metrics at queue time (typically all zeros at intake).

files.description: Repo-relative file paths associated with this item. No external URLs.
